leadText: Tangled Feet (Japanese: ちどりあし Tottering Steps) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While a Pokémon with this Ability is confused , moves targeting it have their accuracy halved. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Tangled Feet has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] While a Pokémon with this Ability is confused , moves targeting it have their accuracy halved.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness when it is confused or cross-eyed. B S L こんらんしているか まどわしじょうたいに なると かいひしやすくなる MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokémon is confused, its evasiveness goes up sharply! MD RT DX When the Pokémon is Confused, its evasiveness goes up sharply.
